creator: siflfran@hawo.stw.uni-erlangen.de
text:
climm provides jabber support which can be enabled by providing the --enable-xmpp option to it's configure script. If this option is set climm depends on gloox which is already in FreeBSD Ports, so the necessary changes to the port are most likely trivial.

Fix: 

Add optional support for gloox to the climm port.
